questions.context_sentence: fox lion tiger giraffe monkey eagle wolf penguin
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 狐狸躲在 box (盒子) 里。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'fox'?
questions.cn: 狐狸 狮子 老虎 长颈鹿 猴子 鹰 狼 企鹅

questions.context_sentence: fox lion tiger giraffe monkey eagle wolf penguin
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 长颈鹿的脖子像图表 (graph) 一样直线向上。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “长颈鹿”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 狐狸 狮子 老虎 长颈鹿 猴子 鹰 狼 企鹅

questions.context_sentence: fox lion tiger giraffe monkey eagle wolf penguin
questions.hint: 元音组合法: ea 发长元音 /i:/，老鹰高高飞翔。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The ____ flies high in the sky to look for food.
questions.cn: 狐狸 狮子 老虎 长颈鹿 猴子 鹰 狼 企鹅

questions.context_sentence: A baby wolf and its mother!
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 狼 (wolf) 在高尔夫 (golf) 球场上奔跑。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'wolf' mean in Chinese?
questions.cn: 一只小狼和它的妈妈！

questions.context_sentence: fox lion tiger giraffe monkey eagle wolf penguin
questions.hint: 词根联想法: pen (钢笔)，企鹅像穿着燕尾服拿着钢笔的绅士。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “企鹅”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 狐狸 狮子 老虎 长颈鹿 猴子 鹰 狼 企鹅

questions.meaning: n. 照顾；护理 v. 关心；在乎
questions.context_sentence: explore the meaning of caring for animals.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 懂得分享 (share) 也就是懂得关心 (care)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We should ____ about the animals in danger. (提示: 照顾；护理 v. 关心；在乎)
questions.cn: 探索关爱动物的意义。

questions.context_sentence: Wolves take good care of their babies.
questions.hint: 短语拆解: take (拿) + care (关心) + of -> 拿出关心去照顾。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the meaning of 'take care of'?
questions.cn: 狼会好好照顾它们的幼崽。

questions.context_sentence: I have a fish sandwich
questions.hint: 合成词记忆: sand (沙) + wich (巫婆) -> 传说中发明三明治的伯爵就在玩沙子的地方吃肉夹面包。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “三明治”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 我有一个鱼肉三明治

questions.context_sentence: Why don't you like snakes?
questions.hint: 字母象形法: S 就像一条弯曲爬行的蛇。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The ____ has no legs but can move very fast.
questions.cn: 你为什么不喜欢蛇？

questions.context_sentence: Because they're really scary.
questions.hint: 词根联想法: scar (伤疤) -> 满身伤疤的人看起来很吓人 (scary)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'scary'?
questions.cn: 因为它们真的很可怕。

questions.context_sentence: They have long necks.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 脖子 (neck) 被掐住了，“耐克” (neck)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “脖子”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 它们有长长的脖子。

questions.context_sentence: Guess! It lives in the sea.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 我们来猜测 (guess) 一下今天的客人 (guest) 是谁。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Can you ____ what is inside the box? (提示: 猜测；估计)
questions.cn: 猜猜看！它生活在海里。

questions.context_sentence: Is it the shark?
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 在黑暗 (dark) 的深海里潜伏着鲨鱼 (shark)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'shark' mean in Chinese?
questions.cn: 是鲨鱼吗？

questions.context_sentence: giraffe snake mouse whale penguin bear
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 鲸 (whale) 发出了“喂哦”的巨大叫声。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “鲸鱼”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 长颈鹿 蛇 老鼠 鲸鱼 企鹅 熊

questions.context_sentence: Elephants look very different from other animals. They are huge.
questions.hint: 拼写规律法: h + uge，字母u在VCE结构中发/ju:/本音，表示极为巨大。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The elephant is a ____ animal with a long trunk.
questions.cn: 大象看起来和其他动物很不一样。它们非常巨大。

questions.context_sentence: because they're dangerous / scary/...
questions.hint: 词缀法: danger (危险) + ous (形容词后缀, 充满...) -> 充满危险的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'dangerous'?
questions.cn: 因为它们很危险/可怕/...

questions.context_sentence: Let's save the forests and not buy things made of ivory.
questions.hint: 形变记忆法: 把人 save (拯救) 出来，他们就 safe (安全) 了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “拯救；节省”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 让我们拯救森林，不要购买象牙制品。

questions.context_sentence: They are also a symbol of good luck here.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 看到那只小鸭子 (duck) 会带来好运 (luck)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I wish you good ____ in your exams!
questions.cn: 它们在这里也是好运的象征。

questions.meaning: adj. 泰国的；泰国人的 n. 泰国人；泰语
questions.context_sentence: On 13 March, we celebrate Thai Elephant Day.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 发音同 tie (领带)，泰国 (Thai) 人打领带。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'Thai' mean?
questions.cn: 在3月13日，我们庆祝泰国大象日。

questions.context_sentence: They have large ears and long trunks.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 大象的鼻子 (trunk) 力量大得能拉动卡车 (truck)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “象鼻”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 它们有大大的耳朵和长长的鼻子。

questions.context_sentence: They can pick up and carry heavy things with their trunks.
questions.hint: 动作联想法: 用手 pick (捡)，用脚 kick (踢)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The girl likes to ____ flowers in the garden. (提示: 捡；摘)
questions.cn: 它们可以用鼻子捡起和搬运重物。

questions.context_sentence: They can pick up and carry heavy things with their trunks.
questions.hint: 方向联想法: pick (捡) + up (向上) -> 把东西从地上拿起来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the meaning of 'pick up'?
questions.cn: 它们可以用鼻子捡起和搬运重物。

questions.context_sentence: They can pick up and carry heavy things with their trunks.
questions.hint: 图像联想法: 用小汽车 (car) 帮忙搬运 (carry) 东西。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “携带；运送”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 它们可以用鼻子捡起和搬运重物。

questions.context_sentence: They are very playful and love to play in the water.
questions.hint: 词缀法: play (玩) + ful (充满的) -> 充满玩心的、爱嬉戏的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The puppies are very ____ and love to jump around. (提示: 爱嬉戏的；爱玩的)
questions.cn: 它们非常爱玩，并且喜欢在水中玩耍。

questions.context_sentence: They are great swimmers.
questions.hint: 词缀法: swim (游泳) + 双写m + er (人) -> 游泳的人。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'swimmer' mean?
questions.cn: 他们是优秀的游泳者。

questions.context_sentence: they can remember one another and places with food
questions.hint: 短语拆解: 一个人 (one) 和另一个人 (another) -> 互相。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “互相”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 它们可以记住彼此和有食物的地方

questions.context_sentence: They look after other elephants when they don't feel well.
questions.hint: 画面感法: look (看) + after (在...之后) -> 跟在后面看着 -> 照顾。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: My parents ____ me very well. (提示: 照顾)
questions.cn: 当其他大象不舒服时，它们会照顾它们。

questions.context_sentence: Elephants are an important part of Thai life and culture.
questions.hint: 词缀关联: 带有 -ture 后缀，和 nature (自然) 相对，是人类创造的文明文化 (culture)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'culture'?
questions.cn: 大象是泰国生活和文化的重要组成部分。

questions.context_sentence: However, they are in danger.
questions.hint: 合成词: how (如何) + ever (总是) -> 无论如何 -> 然而。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “然而”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 然而，他们正处于危险之中。

questions.context_sentence: However, they are in danger.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 愤怒 (anger) 往往会带来危险 (danger)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The sign says '____! Do not enter!'
questions.cn: 然而，他们正处于危险之中。

questions.context_sentence: However, they are in danger.
questions.hint: 固定搭配: in (在...里) + danger (危险)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'in danger' mean?
questions.cn: 然而，他们正处于危险之中。

questions.context_sentence: They live in forests, but people cut down too many trees.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 森林 (forest) 是动物们为了 (for) 休息 (rest) 的地方。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “森林”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 它们住在森林里，但是人们砍伐了太多的树木。

questions.context_sentence: people cut down too many trees.
questions.hint: 动作联想: cut (切) 使得树木倒下 (down)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We shouldn't ____ so many trees in the forest. (提示: 砍伐；减少)
questions.cn: 人们砍伐了太多的树木。

questions.context_sentence: people cut down too many trees.
questions.hint: 语法点: too many 后接可数名词复数 (如 trees)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'too many' mean?
questions.cn: 人们砍伐了太多的树木。

questions.context_sentence: People also kill elephants for their ivory.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 让人生病 (ill) 最终可能会致死 (kill)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “杀死”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 人们也为了象牙而猎杀大象。

questions.context_sentence: Let's save the forests and not buy things made of ivory.
questions.hint: 语法搭配: be made of 看得出原材料的制成。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: This desk is ____ wood.
questions.cn: 让我们拯救森林，不要购买象牙制品。

questions.context_sentence: People also kill elephants for their ivory.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 哎我日 (i-vo-ry)，偷猎者居然拔大象牙。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'ivory' mean in Chinese?
questions.cn: 人们也为了象牙而猎杀大象。

questions.context_sentence: She is quite a friendly dog
questions.hint: 词缀法: friend (朋友) + ly (形容词后缀) -> 像朋友一样的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “友好的”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 她是一只非常友好的狗

questions.context_sentence: She is quite a friendly dog, but she is not scary at all!
questions.hint: 形似字区分: quite (相当)，把 e 放到外面是“相当”出格，把 e 关在里面是 quiet (安静)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The film is ____ interesting. (提示: 相当；完全)
questions.cn: 她是一只非常友好的狗，一点也不可怕！

questions.context_sentence: She is quite a friendly dog
questions.hint: 短语搭配: quite a + 名词或形容词修饰的单数名词。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'quite a' mean?
questions.cn: 她是一只非常友好的狗

questions.context_sentence: but she is not scary at all!
questions.hint: 强调句型: 否定词后加 at all 强调“绝对没有”。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “一点也不”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 但她一点都不可怕！

questions.context_sentence: She has beautiful fur.
questions.hint: 谐音记忆法: 天冷了，发 (fur) 我一件毛皮大衣。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The polar bear has thick white ____ to keep warm. (提示: 软毛)
questions.cn: 她有美丽的皮毛。

questions.context_sentence: You see, I am blind.
questions.hint: 联想记忆法: 眼睛瞎了 (blind) 就找 (find) 不到路了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What is the Chinese meaning of 'blind'?
questions.cn: 你知道，我是个盲人。

questions.context_sentence: She can see and has great hearing.
questions.hint: 词干法: hear (听) 加 -ing 变成名词听觉。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “听觉；听力”对应的英文单词是？
questions.cn: 她能看见，而且听力很好。

questions.context_sentence: She helps me find my way around.
questions.hint: 动作短语: 找到 (find) 我的路 (way) 绕着走 (around) -> 不迷路。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: With a map, I can ____ easily in the city.
questions.cn: 她帮助我找到路。

questions.context_sentence: This helps them to think about and do more than one thing at once.
questions.hint: 语境记忆: once 表示一次，at once 表示在同一次做 -> 同时/马上。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'at once' mean?
questions.cn: 这帮助他们同时思考和做多件事情。

questions.context_sentence: Octopuses can also fit into small places because they do not have any bones!
questions.hint: 空间感: fit (合适) + into (进入里面) -> 大小正好塞得进。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: “塞进；融入”对应的英文短语是？
questions.cn: 章鱼也能钻进狭小的地方，因为它们没有任何骨头！

questions.context_sentence: This helps the octopuses to get away fast.
questions.hint: 动向记忆: 走开 (get away) 以免被抓。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: The thief tried to ____ before the police arrived. (提示: 逃跑；离开)
questions.cn: 这帮助章鱼快速逃脱。

questions.context_sentence: What's more, when an octopus loses an arm, it can grow it back!
questions.hint: 句式连接词: 用来进一步补充更棒或更重要的事情。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What does 'What's more' mean?
options: n. 照顾；护理 v. 关心；在乎
questions.cn: 更重要的是，当章鱼失去一只触手时，它还能重新长出来！

questions.context_sentence: why it is important to protect it!
questions.hint: 词缀法: pro (向前/提前) + tect (掩盖) -> 提前掩护 -> 保护。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We must ____ the earth from pollution. (提示: 保护)
questions.cn: 为什么保护它很重要！
